title: ulmus campestris var. rotundifolia
intro: Ulmus campestris var. rotundifolia, commonly known as the English elm, is a deciduous tree species native to Europe. The bark of this tree has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ulmus campestris var. rotundifolia are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant often take the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
